title: astragalus ampullarius
intro: Astragalus ampullarius, also known as Chinese milk vetch, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus ampullarius include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced stress levels. Astragalus ampullarius can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
